case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JAMES RUSSELL et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL, JAMES JR.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSELL, JAMES JR. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 126 WEST POINT ROAD, S.F. CA. 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY $1.80 PER DAY AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL, JAMES JR.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL, JAMES JR.
